text_excerpt: Cost-of-Living - help and support - Louise Haigh MP - Louise Haigh MP Skip to main content Louise Haigh MP Fighting for Sheffield's future Home About Louise News Policy Campaigns In Parliament Contact Me Local Business Champions 2025 Cost-of-Living – help and support Mental Health Services Gleadless Valley Masterplan More Search Search the website Search Menu Cost-of-Living – help and support Cost-of-living resource The cost-of-living crisis is a national emergency that will affect us all, as across Sheffield and the country households face energy bills they can’t afford. I’ve created an online resource which collates the details of organisations, services and charities that are available to help people manage their finances. Also included are a list of mental health charities based across the city to help people manage their own mental health at this worrying and stressful time.
